name: readme-generator-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Generate README.md files from project analysis.

tools.name: generate_readme
tools.description: Generate a complete README.md from project metadata including sections for install, usage, API, and contributing.

tools.name: analyze_project
tools.description: Analyze project structure from a file list to recommend README sections and detect project type.

tools.name: suggest_sections
tools.description: Suggest appropriate README sections based on project type and capabilities.

tools.name: generate_badges
tools.description: Generate shield.io badge markdown for a GitHub repository.
